self.__next_f.push([1,"{\"@context\":\"https://schema.org\",\"@type\":\"FAQPage\",\"mainEntity\":[{\"@type\":\"Question\",\"name\":\"What is a daily horoscope?\",\"acceptedAnswer\":{\"@type\":\"Answer\",\"text\":\"A daily horoscope is an astrological forecast based on the position of planets relative to your zodiac sign. Our predictions use a sophisticated 9-planet transit matrix that analyzes 8 life dimensions including career, love, health, and finance.\"}},{\"@type\":\"Question\",\"name\":\"Sun sign vs Moon sign - what's the difference?\",\"acceptedAnswer\":{\"@type\":\"Answer\",\"text\":\"Your Sun sign is determined by your birth date and represents your core personality. Your Moon sign is based on the Moon's position at your exact birth time and reflects your emotional nature. In Vedic astrology, the Moon sign (Rashi) is considered primary for horoscope predictions.\"}},{\"@type\":\"Question\",\"name\":\"Why trust VastuCart horoscope predictions?\",\"acceptedAnswer\":{\"@type\":\"Answer\",\"text\":\"VastuCart uses an advanced Vedic astrology engine that computes a 9-planet x 12-house x 8-dimension transit matrix. Each prediction is algorithmically generated from real-time planetary positions, not generic templates. Our system refreshes daily at midnight IST.\"}},{\"@type\":\"Question\",\"name\":\"How often are horoscope predictions updated?\",\"acceptedAnswer\":{\"@type\":\"Answer\",\"text\":\"Our daily horoscopes are computed fresh every day based on real-time planetary positions. Weekly predictions update every Monday, monthly forecasts at the start of each month, and annual predictions are recalculated for each new year.\"}},{\"@type\":\"Question\",\"name\":\"What are the 8 life dimensions in your predictions?\",\"acceptedAnswer\":{\"@type\":\"Answer\",\"text\":\"We analyze Career, Love, Health, Finance, Family, Spirituality, Education, and Travel. Each dimension receives an independent score based on how planetary transits affect that specific area of your life for the day.\"}},{\"@type\":\"Question\",\"name\":\"Can I check horoscope predictions for past dates?\",\"acceptedAnswer\":{\"@type\":\"Answer\",\"text\":\"Yes! Our archive pages let you view horoscope predictions for any past date. Since all predictions are computed from actual planetary positions using ephemeris data, they are 100% accurate and consistent regardless of when you access them.\"}},{\"@type\":\"Question\",\"name\":\"Is Vedic astrology different from Western astrology?\",\"acceptedAnswer\":{\"@type\":\"Answer\",\"text\":\"Yes. Vedic (Jyotish) astrology uses the sidereal zodiac based on actual star positions, while Western astrology uses the tropical zodiac. Vedic astrology also places greater emphasis on the Moon sign and incorporates nakshatras (lunar mansions) for more precise predictions.\"}}]}"])

to-transparent\"}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L11\",null,{\"items\":[{\"question\":\"What is a daily horoscope?\",\"answer\":\"A daily horoscope is an astrological forecast based on the position of planets relative to your zodiac sign. Our predictions use a sophisticated 9-planet transit matrix that analyzes 8 life dimensions including career, love, health, and finance.\"},{\"question\":\"Sun sign vs Moon sign - what's the difference?\",\"answer\":\"Your Sun sign is determined by your birth date and represents your core personality. Your Moon sign is based on the Moon's position at your exact birth time and reflects your emotional nature. In Vedic astrology, the Moon sign (Rashi) is considered primary for horoscope predictions.\"},{\"question\":\"Why trust VastuCart horoscope predictions?\",\"answer\":\"VastuCart uses an advanced Vedic astrology engine that computes a 9-planet x 12-house x 8-dimension transit matrix. Each prediction is algorithmically generated from real-time planetary positions, not generic templates. Our system refreshes daily at midnight IST.\"},{\"question\":\"How often are horoscope predictions updated?\",\"answer\":\"Our daily horoscopes are computed fresh every day based on real-time planetary positions. Weekly predictions update every Monday, monthly forecasts at the start of each month, and annual predictions are recalculated for each new year.\"},{\"question\":\"What are the 8 life dimensions in your predictions?\",\"answer\":\"We analyze Career, Love, Health, Finance, Family, Spirituality, Education, and Travel. Each dimension receives an independent score based on how planetary transits affect that specific area of your life for the day.\"},{\"question\":\"Can I check horoscope predictions for past dates?\",\"answer\":\"Yes! Our archive pages let you view horoscope predictions for any past date. Since all predictions are computed from actual planetary positions using ephemeris data, they are 100% accurate and consistent regardless of when you access them.\"},{\"question\":\"Is Vedic astrology different from Western astrology?\",\"answer\":\"Yes. Vedic (Jyotish) astrology uses the sidereal zodiac based on actual star positions, while Western astrology uses the tropical zodiac. Vedic astrology also places greater emphasis on the Moon sign and incorporates nakshatras (lunar mansions) for more precise predictions.\"}]}],[\"$\",\"script\",null,{\"type\":\"application/ld+json\",\"dangerouslySetInnerHTML\":{\"__html\":\"$12\"}}]]}]]\n"])
